issues.description: First effect should have condition Always (no condition stated for initial power reduction), but second effect requires condition 'HasLifeCount' with value ≤2, not a separate trigger
Second action (conditional +1000 power) is incorrectly placed in same effect; must be separate effect with condition 'HasLifeCount' type with maxCount:2
Extraneous second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and KO action has no basis in card text; should be removed entirely
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for "during this turn" effect, but must clarify this is DuringYourTurn context
